name: Ollama
setup: Modeles :cloud -> ollama signin (tier gratuit: quota qui reset toutes les 5h + hebdo, 1 modele concurrent ; Pro 20$/mois, Max 100$/mois). Modeles locaux -> ollama pull <id>. Source : ollama.com/search, ollama.com/pricing

models.name: GLM 5.2 Cloud
models.note: cloud, flagship Z.ai taches longues/agentiques — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: MiniMax M3 Cloud
models.note: cloud, coding/agentique frontier, contexte 1M — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: DeepSeek V4 Pro Cloud
models.note: cloud, MoE frontier 3 modes de reasoning — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: DeepSeek V4 Flash Cloud
models.note: cloud, 284B/13B actifs, coding/agents rapides, 1M ctx — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: Kimi K2.7 Code Cloud
models.note: cloud, modele coding Moonshot avec vision — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: Qwen3 Coder 480B Cloud
models.note: cloud, coding specialiste 480B, 256K ctx (jusqu'a 1M) — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: Qwen3.5 Cloud
models.note: cloud, coding/agent polyvalent — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: GPT-OSS 120B Cloud
models.note: cloud, reasoning OpenAI open-weight, tools — signin requis, quota gratuit

models.name: Qwen3 Coder 30B (local)
models.note: local, coding specialiste MoE 30B-A3B, tools, 256K ctx — RAM mini a contexte modere, OOM possible a 256K

models.name: GLM 4.7 Flash (local)
models.note: local, MoE 30B-A3B 'plus fort de la classe 30B', 198K ctx (q4_K_M) — necessite Ollama >= 0.14.3

models.name: GPT-OSS 20B (local)
models.note: local, reasoning + tools (function calling, structured output), 128K ctx

models.name: GPT-OSS 120B (local)
models.note: local, reasoning lourd + tools — necessite ~76GB RAM/VRAM, machines costaudes uniquement

models.name: Granite 4.1 8B (local)
models.note: local leger, tool use, 128K ctx — tourne sur machine modeste

models.name: Qwen3.5 9B (local)
models.note: local leger, 256K ctx — bon rapport taille/contexte
